description: Comprehensive Kafka consumer lag and health monitoring for Klag (https://github.com/themoah/klag). Lag, velocity, hot partitions, time-based lag, data-loss-prevention and JVM runtime metrics. Requires a Prometheus-compatible data source.

spec.description: Shows cumulative state changes over time. Spikes indicate state transitions (rebalances, failures).
spec.title: Consumer Group State Changes

spec.description: Lag in milliseconds based on Kafka message timestamps
spec.title: Time Lag by Consumer Group

spec.description: Estimated seconds until lag reaches zero (only shown when consumer is catching up)
spec.title: Time to Close Lag (Catching Up Only)

spec.description: Percentage of topic retention consumed by consumer lag. High values indicate risk of data loss.
spec.title: Retention Percent by Consumer Group

spec.description: Topics where consumer lag exceeds 50% of retention period. These are at risk of data loss.
spec.title: At Risk Topics (>50% Retention Used)

spec.description: Partitions with disproportionately high throughput (messages/second). Value is throughput × 100 for precision.
spec.title: Hot Partition Throughput Over Time

spec.description: Seconds since the committed offset last advanced (only reported while lag > 0). High and rising = a stuck/wedged consumer with pending work. Inferred from observed offset movement; resets on klag restart.
spec.title: Commit Staleness by Consumer Group

title: Klag - Kafka Lag Monitoring
